templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum adding terms for the use of artificial intelligence and machine learning features to an existing agreement.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA) for HIPAA-compliant handling of protected health information between covered entities and business associates.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA) Standard Terms for providing access to a cloud-based / SaaS service.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement (DPA) governing the processing of personal data in compliance with applicable data protection laws.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for collaborating with early customers to co-develop and provide feedback on a product.

templates.name: Mutual NDA - Cover Page
templates.description: Cover Page for the Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement, capturing the business terms and incorporating the Standard Terms by reference.

templates.name: Mutual NDA - Standard Terms
templates.description: Standard Terms for the Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement governing the exchange of confidential information between two parties.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement establishing the terms of a business partnership, including referral, reseller, and co-marketing arrangements.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for running a time-limited evaluation or proof-of-concept of a product before a full commercial engagement.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement (PSA) Standard Terms for delivering professional or consulting services under statements of work.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement (SLA) defining service availability commitments, support response targets, and related remedies.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement Standard Terms for licensing software to a customer.
